weaknesses: No mention of which ATL skills were applied in developing the manual
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: The manual does not identify or describe any Approaches to Learning skills used, so there is no evidence of how these skills supported development of the product.

weaknesses: No clear learning goal or connection to personal interest in the introduction
No measurable success criteria defined for the manual
Lacks a detailed plan with sequencing of steps, timelines, or resource allocation
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: The submission does not articulate a specific learning goal or tie it to personal motivation, making planning unfocused. Without defined success criteria, it is difficult to judge completion or quality. The table of contents outlines topics but fails to provide a structured sequence, timing, or resources needed to execute the plan.

weaknesses: No reflection evaluating the manual against success criteria
No discussion of the impact of creating the manual on personal learning
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: There is no section assessing the manualâs effectiveness or whether it met intended criteria, nor is there any commentary on what the author learned through the process.

annotations.comment: Your introduction does not state a clear learning goal or its connection to personal interest, which is essential for focused planning.
You have not defined measurable success criteria for this manual, making it difficult to assess whether objectives are met.
The table of contents outlines content but lacks a clear plan with sequencing of steps, timelines, or resource allocation.
There is no mention of which ATL skills you applied in developing this manual; explicitly outlining these would strengthen evidence of skill application.
The manual does not include a reflection evaluating its effectiveness against your own success criteria or its impact on your learning.
